label: agent channels • read against a non-allowlisted room is rejected and stores nothing
query: deterministic policy pin — no model involved
notes: First of the four cases this suite's README specified: seed a Slack connection with one readable channel, then drive agent_channel_read_messages at a DIFFERENT channel id. The real connection service must reject (not-allowlisted) before the fake provider client is ever asked, and the message store must gain zero rows for the denied room. CI-safe: fake clients, isolated stores, no network, no model.
